recommendations.title: Amores Perros
recommendations.overview: A fatalistic car crash in Mexico city sets off a chain of events in the lives of three people: a supermodel, a young man wanting to run off with his sister-in-law, and a homeless man.

recommendations.title: Vengeance Is Mine
recommendations.overview: A thief, a murderer, and a charming lady-killer, Iwao Enokizu is on the run from the police.

recommendations.title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
recommendations.overview: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.

recommendations.title: Triage
recommendations.overview: The wife of a photojournalist sets out to discover why he came home from a recent assignment without his colleague.

recommendations.title: A Man and a Woman
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman meet by accident on a Sunday evening at their childrens' boarding school. Slowly, they reveal themselves to each other, finding that they have something deeply in common.

recommendations.title: Queen of Katwe
recommendations.overview: A young girl overcomes her disadvantaged upbringing in the slums of Uganda to become a Chess master.

recommendations.title: Ae Fond Kiss...
recommendations.overview: A young man upsets his Punjabi family when he falls in love with an Irish schoolteacher.

recommendations.title: I, Daniel Blake
recommendations.overview: A middle aged carpenter, who requires state welfare after injuring himself, is joined by a single mother in a similar scenario.

recommendations.title: No Man's Land
recommendations.overview: Two soldiers from opposite sides get stuck between the front lines in the same trench. The UN is asked to free them and both sides agree on a ceasefire, but will they stick to it?

recommendations.title: The Eel
recommendations.overview: A businessman kills his adulterous wife and is sent to prison. After his release, he opens a barbershop and meets new people, talking  to almost no one except for an eel he befriended while in prison.
